title: SysOperation batch job (Contract + Service + Controller + menu item)
instruction: In the sandbox model, build a SysOperation batch job named DemoBatch. Create: (1) a DataContract class DemoBatchContract with two integer parm methods, batchSize and priorityFactor ([DataContractAttribute], [DataMemberAttribute] parm methods, reused/new labels via the labels tool -- do not invent raw-text labels); (2) a Service class DemoBatchService with a void process(DemoBatchContract) entry point AND a separately-callable, pure int calculateEffectiveBatchSize(DemoBatchContract) helper that returns batchSize * priorityFactor (this is the part judged by the SysTest, since a golden diff can't verify the arithmetic); (3) a Controller class DemoBatchController extends SysOperationServiceController with construct() (wiring parmClassName/parmMethodName to the Service's process method) and a static main(Args) entry point; (4) an action menu item DemoProcessBatch pointing at the Controller. Use extension_info / prepare / get_knowledge(topic="sysoperation") to ground the pattern. All four objects must build clean. Runtime correctness is judged by the SysTest in eval/systests/L3-batch-basic.xml (class EvalL3BatchCalcTest), which constructs the contract and service directly and asserts the multiplication.
